items.name: Vintage 2000s Gyaru McBling Grunge Bag Brown
items.description:
This piece comes in multiple colorways, check them out!
https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611/Laveys-CoutureElevate your style with this vintage 2000s belt bag, a standout piece that blends Gyaru, McBling, and grunge aesthetics. Crafted with rich brown leather sides and a striking vintage dark orange leather centerpiece, this design is accented with bold panels for a wild edge. Metallic spikes along the sides and sparkling faux diamond embellishments add a perfect mix of grit and glam. This bag is the ultimate accessory to showcase your unapologetic Punk Y2K-inspired fashion.

items.name: Chic Paddington Black Leather Silver Lock Bag
items.description:
ALL COLORS:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=11&Subcategory=24&CreatorName=Pryse&salesTypeFilter=1

It was on a rainy Tuesday in a Paris internet café when Chloe stumbled upon it—a vintage gem tucked away on Vestiaire Collective, calling her name like a long-lost friend. With its effortlessly slouchy silhouette and soft dark leather, the bag had that lived-in luxury only time could craft.
A bold silver padlock anchored the front, gleaming softly like a secret waiting to be told. Not just an accessory, but a statement—equal parts whimsical and refined. The bag’s weight felt reassuring on her arm, like carrying a little piece of nostalgia with every step.

Soft, structured, and unapologetically chic—this piece isn’t just worn. It’s lived in.

items.name: chain
items.description:
This awesome and classic iced out diamond chain necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .
